data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Implementation of cryptographic protocols to safeguard user data.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Offer optional user account protection through a second verification step.
data.technical_spec: OTP via SMS and authentication app compatibility.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Constant monitoring and defense against potential security breaches.

data.title: Data Breach Contingency Planning
data.description: Protocols in place for rapid response to any data breaches.
data.technical_spec: Incident response team and predefined SOPs.

data.title: User Privacy Controls
data.description: Tools and settings provided to users to control data privacy.
data.technical_spec: Privacy settings for posts and account visibility.
